scope.summary: Wire the backend hosted-session manager to real zca-rust QR/login/listen/send flows, with one throttled worker per cloud account and non-secret live evidence.
goals: Run QR login on the backend and store encrypted credentials
Restore hosted sessions after backend restart
Forward realtime events to the cloud message store and subscribed devices
Send text/sticker/reaction through the hosted per-account throttle

acceptance.description: A real Zalo account logs in through the hosted backend, receives a realtime event, sends a text message, and restores after backend restart.

verification.manual: Attach .harness/evidence/cloud-zalo-session-host/checks/hosted.qr.restore-20260603170700/check.json and the latest smoke.hosted-send-realtime check artifact; transcript must be redacted and prove QR login, restart restore, live send, and SSE.
